DEFENDANT FDCC CALIFORNIA, INC. FKA DINWIDDIE CONSTRUCTION COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant FDCC California, Inc. fka Dinwiddie Construction Company's motion to strike portions of plaintiff's complaint is denied. The complaint alleges sufficient facts to support a claim for punitive damages and defendant did not demonstrate that such a claim is barred against a dissolved corporation. The Court further denied defendant's request for judicial notice of a print out from the Secretary of State's website showing its status as dissolved. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Early K. Langley of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #3537 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
